recentArticles.title: Michael Jackson Biopic Hits Unprecedented Box Office Milestone In Week 5 - ScreenRant
recentArticles.snippet: # Michael Jackson Biopic Hits Unprecedented Box Office Milestone In Week 5. The controversial biopic *Michael*, which tells the story of King of Pop Michael Jackson without directly addressing his allegations of child sexual abuse, was directed by Antoine Fuqua and stars the music icon's real-life nephew Jaafar Jackson in the title role opposite a star-studded ensemble cast that includes Colman Domingo, Miles Teller, Nia Long, Laura Harrier, and Mike Myers. Per *Lionsgate*, as of **Sunday** morning, *Michael* is projected to earn a 3-day total of **$20 million** by the end of its fifth weekend at the domestic box office and a 4-day total of **$25.7 million** over the Memorial Day holiday weekend. Quincy Jones — Michael met him on the set of The Wiz (1978), and Jones went on to produce the trio of albums that defined Michael's solo career: Off the Wall (1979), Thriller (1982) and Bad (1987).

recentArticles.title: Drake Becomes First Artist to Hold Top Three Billboard 200 Spots - Pitchfork
recentArticles.snippet: Earlier this month, Drake turned a long-teased album drop into a three album bonanza, releasing the new LPs *Iceman,* *Habibti*, and *Maid of Honour* at once on May 15. Now, *Billboard* reports that he has become the first artist to hold the No. 1, 2, and 3 spots on its Billboard 200 chart in the same week since it began publishing on a consistent weekly schedule in 1956. *Iceman,* *Habibti*, and *Maid of Honour* marked Drake’s first new solo albums since 2023’s *For All the Dogs.* (Crucially, it’s also his first LP drop since the Kendrick Lamar beef that became so ubiquitous it reached the Super Bowl LIX halftime show and led Drake to sue his own label, UMG, a legal dispute he references multiple times across his latest trio of LPs. The suit was dismissed in October 2025.) He also released a joint album with longtime collaborator and fellow Canadian PartyNextDoor, *$ome $exy $ongs 4 U*, in 2025.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導美國歌手Drake創下告示牌專輯榜前三名的紀錄，與周杰倫無直接關聯。

recentArticles.title: Startup backed by American Eagle CEO reaches unicorn status in latest funding round - CNBC
recentArticles.snippet: # Startup backed by American Eagle CEO reaches unicorn status in latest funding round. * Radar, a startup backed by American Eagle CEO Jay Schottenstein that helps retailers reduce theft, is now valued at over $1 billion. * The company, which works with American Eagle and Gap's Old Navy, raised $170 million at a valuation of over $1 billion in its series B funding round. * Radar helps address one of the most challenging aspects of running a retail business: inventory management. Radar, a startup backed by American Eagle CEO Jay Schottenstein that helps retailers manage in-store inventory and cut back on theft and lost merchandise, reached unicorn status with its latest funding round, CNBC has learned. The company, founded in 2013 by Spencer Hewett, raised $170 million at a valuation of over $1 billion in its series B funding round, which was co-led by Gideon Strategic Partners and Nimble Partners with participation from Align Ventures.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞資訊與華語歌手周杰倫無關，而是關於美國鷹牌CEO Jay Schottenstein支持的一家新創公司Radar達到獨角獸地位。

recentArticles.snippet: # John Summit announces ‘CTRL Escape Tour,’ Barclays show. That includes a stop at Brooklyn’s Barclays Center on Saturday, Nov. 28. “It’s time to bring the world of CTRL ESCAPE to life.”. For the uninitiated, “CTRL ESCAPE” is Summit’s second studio album that hit shelves on April 15. “This is a kind of a crazy, artistic journey, and I love to be able to share my story of breaking out of the matrix that is the corporate life and really try to push boundaries as best I can in electronic music,” Summit explained. As of now, there’s no word on who the special guests joining Summit on the ‘CTRL Escape’ run are. recentArticles.title: First Look at BTS Jung Kook's Debut Collaboration With Calvin Klein - Hypebeast
recentArticles.snippet: # First Look at BTS Jung Kook's Debut Collaboration With Calvin Klein. ## Featuring approximately 20 items co-designed by the global icon, the highly anticipated capsule collection officially arrives this month. * Calvin Klein has announced its first-ever collaborative apparel collection with global brand ambassador and BTS member, Jung Kook. * The capsule features approximately 20 distinct items, with Jung Kook personally involved in the design process. * An exclusive online pre-sale for “My Calvins” members will take place on the morning of May 20. The partnership between Calvin Klein and global pop icon Jung Kook is reaching an exciting new milestone. Calvin Klein has announced its very first collaborative collection with Jung Kook, offering fans a unique opportunity to wear pieces directly influenced by his personal aesthetic and creative vision. To celebrate the monumental launch of the collection, Calvin Klein will also debut a brand-new promotional campaign showcasing Jung Kook’s new creative direction.

recentArticles.title: Keke Palmer hosted Billboard Women in Music 2026 in Los Angeles - artthreat.net
recentArticles.snippet: **Keke Palmer** brought star power and infectious energy to the **Billboard Women in Music 2026 Awards** on **April 29** at the iconic **Hollywood Palladium** in **Los Angeles**. The multi-Emmy Award-winning actress, producer, and music artist hosted the star-studded ceremony celebrating the most influential women in the music industry, while also taking the stage to perform her new single **“Text Message Unsent.”** The event honored groundbreaking female artists across multiple award categories, from emerging talent to established powerhouses reshaping the landscape. * **Keke Palmer hosted and performed at the Billboard Women in Music 2026 Awards**. Known for her work across television, film, music, and digital platforms, **Palmer has built a diverse career spanning from “Akeelah and the Bee” to her podcast “Baby, This is Keke Palmer.”** Her role combined hosting duties with her own performance moment, where she delivered an energetic rendition of **“Text Message Unsent,”** a track from the soundtrack EP tied to her recent film project.
recentArticles.summary: Keke Palmer hosted Billboard Women in Music 2026 in Los Angeles - artthreat.net

recentArticles.title: Drake Is A Sore Loser On 'Iceman.' Sounds Like Someone Else We Know. - HuffPost
recentArticles.snippet: In 43 songs, one of the most successful rappers of the century shows us he just can't move on. Here are the other bright spots: Drake is doing something interesting sonically on tracks like “Janice STFU” and displaying his knack for hit-making on “Shabang.” And while it is not a personal favorite, the West Coast-sounding “2 Hard 4 The Radio” shows a defiant Drake when it comes to not being limited to the regional sounds he chooses to jump on. Drake also continues to be salty with A$AP Rocky, seemingly taunting the rapper-actor with “Where she at?/Where she go” on “Burning Bridges.” Drake seemingly never got over Rihanna daring to move on from him and create a family with Rocky, so in Drake’s mind, pointing out that the mother of his children didn’t post about his single is worth highlighting.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞資訊主要探討饒舌歌手Drake的音樂作品與個人爭議，與周杰倫無直接關聯。

recentArticles.title: Khris Riddick-Tynes Is Building for Legacy - Newsweek
recentArticles.snippet: # Khris Riddick-Tynes Is Building for Legacy. The multihyphenate co-wrote and co-produced SZA’s “Snooze,” the 2024 Grammy-winning Best R&B Song and one of the most-streamed R&B records of the decade, as well as Kehlani’s “Folded,” her biggest solo chart moment to date. Not only is Riddick-Tynes an acclaimed producer with a wealth of credits under his belt, ranging from Kehlani and SZA to Drake and Ariana Grande, but he also earned his J.D. while producing some of the biggest songs in the world and formerly working as an executive, as SVP and co-head of Arista Records. By the time the project arrived as her fifth studio album, that long-view approach had paid off: the album marked a major moment in her catalog and was widely framed as a statement release, with Riddick-Tynes helping guide its sound and direction from the inside out. "I think the first thing is, you know, intention, do we have the same intention, which is to make timeless music, right, and to make music that people feel, and also to win?" Riddick-Tynes says.

recentArticles.title: VIDEO: Europe rPET looking less volatile in June, but still room for price moves - ICIS
recentArticles.snippet: #### 搜索过于频繁，请输入验证码. ### 重大新闻. ## [新华社] 习近平：坚定不移走中国特色卫生与健康发展道路 推动“十五五”时期健康中国建设取得决定性进展. 中共中央总书记、国家主席、中央军委主席习近平6日下午看望了参加全国政协十四届四次会议的农工党、九三学社、医药卫生界、社会福利和社会保障界委员，并参加联组会，听取意见和建议。他强调，到2035年建成健康中国是中共中央作出的一项战略决策，“十五五”是实现这一目标的关键时期，必须统筹谋划、加紧推进，力求取得决定性进展。. 在“三八”国际劳动妇女节即将到来之际，习近平代表中共中央，向参加全国两会的女代表、女委员、女工作人员，向全国各族各界妇女，向香港特别行政区、澳门特别行政区、台湾地区的女同胞和海外女侨胞，致以节日祝福和美好祝愿。. 联组会上，王路、马秀珍、卢柯、蒋建东、巴桑卓玛、刘启芳等6位委员，分别就实施健康优先发展战略、提升基层医疗服务水平、加强材料技术攻关、推进创新药研发、做好高原病防治、发展公益慈善事业等作了发言。. 在听取大家发言后，习近平发表重要讲话。他表示，很高兴同大家一起讨论，听取意见建议。他代表中共中央，向在座各位委员，并向农工党、九三学社成员，向医药卫生界、社会福利和社会保障界人士，向广大政协委员，致以诚挚问候。. 习近平指出，过去一年，人民政协认真履职尽责，围绕谋划“十五五”等方面建言献策，为党和国家事业发展作出了新贡献。农工党、九三学社各级组织和广大成员积极参政议政、开展社会服务，各项工作取得新成效。医药卫生界、社会福利和社会保障界人士自觉投身建设健康中国、增进民生福祉的生动实践，展现了新作为。. 习近平强调，我国是社会主义国家，是人口规模巨大、城乡区域差距仍然较大的发展中国家。建设健康中国，必须坚持从我国国情出发，坚定不移走中国特色卫生与健康发展道路，坚定不移贯彻新时代卫生与健康工作方针。随着形势发展变化，卫生与健康工作需要优化完善一些具体政策举措，但在根本问题上必须始终头脑清醒、保持战略定力。. 习近平指出，建设健康中国是一项系统工程。面对人民群众日益增长的多元化卫生健康需求，必须突出重点，紧紧抓住那些惠及面广、牵一发而动全身的工作，在健全公共卫生体系、建设优质高效医疗服务体系、倡导健康文明生活方式等方面集中力量和资源、采取有效措施加以推动，不断取得新的成效。. 习近平强调，要健全党委统一领导、党政齐抓共管的工作格局，完善健康促进政策制度体系，为健康中国建设提供有力保障。进一步深化改革，完善医疗、医保、医药协同发展和治理机制。推动科技创新成果转化运用，推进全民健康数智化建设。加强卫生健康行业党建工作，调动广大医务人员的积极性主动性创造性，加大人才培养力度，弘扬优良医德医风，着力营造风清气正的行业环境。. 习近平指出，建设健康中国，需要全社会共同努力。人民政协要发挥专门协商机构作用，聚焦相关理论和实践问题深入调查研究，提出务实管用的对策建议。农工党、九三学社成员，医药卫生界、社会福利和社会保障界人士，要用好专业优势，积极贡献智慧和力量。. 石泰峰、何维、武维华、邵鸿、王东峰、杨震等参加联组会。. 原文链接：https://www.nhc.gov.cn/wjw/mtbd/202603/9f96267d3b84408d940c741eb784f2a5.shtml). ### 相关文章. ### 用户登录.

recentArticles.title: 11 Cool New Gadgets to Keep on Your Radar - Gear Patrol
recentArticles.snippet: Catching you up on the past week’s most notable product releases. This past week, Wrensilva introduced its most compact modern record console to date, Sony revealed a new flagship mirrorless camera, and Garmin announced two entry-level running watches. Below, we’ve rounded up all the most interesting new releases and announcements you might have missed from the past week. Wharfedale’s Denton 1S are new, reimagined versions of the company’s original Denton 1 bookshelf speakers, which were released in 1974. Wrensilva’s Studio is a modern record console that’s essentially a smaller (and more affordable) version of the company’s previous record consoles, including the $19,000 M1 and $15,000 The Standard. The Sony A7R VI is the company’s highest-resolution mirrorless camera to date. The Audio-Technica AT-VM95EBK is the newest addition to the brand’s VM95 series of entry-level phono cartridges. The Shanling EC Play is a new-age Discman built in the same vein as the brand’s other portable speakers.
recentArticles.summary: 這篇新聞報導了過去一週發布的各種新科技產品，包括唱片機、相機和運動手錶等，但內容中未提及周杰倫。

recentArticles.title: Forget the Friendship Bracelets—Kaia Gerber and Jake Shane Prefer Matching Chanel Bags - Vogue
recentArticles.snippet: Your All-Access Pass to Vogue. # Forget the Friendship Bracelets—Kaia Gerber and Jake Shane Prefer Matching Chanel Bags. It’s not uncommon when a couple starts dating that they experience the fashion mind-meld of dressing alike, but never underestimate the power of #twinning with your bestie—just ask Kaia Gerber and Jake Shane. Yesterday, the pair went for sushi at trendy hotspot Matsuhisa in Beverly Hills and, with their matching outfits and clasped hands, the model-Internet personality duo telegraphed to the world that they’re totally in sync. But the most telling sign of their friendship wasn’t the coordinating outfits or Shane’s supportive headwear, but the duo’s matching bags. For Kaia Gerber and Jake Shane, friendship bracelets are a thing of the past—it’s all about the bestie bag now. * Listen to *The Run-Through with Vogue*, a weekly podcast featuring the most exciting stories and hot takes from the worlds of culture, politics, sports and–of course–fashion.
recentArticles.summary: 這篇報導主要關注名模Kaia Gerber與好友Jake Shane以搭配的香奈兒包包展現深厚友誼，內容與周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.title: Executive Turntable: ZaZa Kazadi Elevated at Sony Music Publishing, Guitar Center Adds to Board - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: Music industry new hires and promotions took place at AEG Presents U.K., Activist Artist Management and more. Sony Music Publishing has promoted **ZaZa Kazadi** to senior director of A&R, U.K. and Europe. He will remain based in the company’s London office. In his new role, Kazadi will be responsible for expanding opportunities for songwriters in the U.K. and Europe with a focus on hip-hop, rap, R&B and Afro genres. “I’m incredibly honored to step into this new role,” Kazadi said in a statement. “It’s a privilege to be part of such a forward-thinking and supportive team. His roles at Sony Music Publishing included serving as senior A&R manager and director of A&R, UK. **Sarah Gabrielli**, head of A&R, Sony Music Publishing UK, said, “ZaZa is one of the sharpest A&R’s I’ve worked with — his judgement, clarity of vision and determination consistently set him apart. **David Kalt**, has been appointed to the board of directors at Guitar Center.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞內容與周杰倫無關，主要報導索尼音樂出版和Guitar Center的人事異動。

recentArticles.title: For Calvin Klein and Maxfield, a Very L.A. Love Story - Vogue
recentArticles.snippet: # For Calvin Klein and Maxfield, a Very L.A. Love Story. To mark the month-long partnership between Calvin Klein Collection and Maxfield, the party called for cocktails and dinner at Chateau Marmont’s beloved Bungalow 1. Guests including Tracee Ellis Ross, Jodie Turner-Smith, Michelle Randolph, and an expectant Gia Coppola and Honor Titus settled in for a meal of Mediterranean branzino and steak frites at a long candlelit table laden with purple spider orchids; a notable departure from the founding designer’s famed penchant for white flowers only. The collection at the root of the celebration was very much in the spotlight: Ellis Ross wore the oversized pom-pom number with aplomb, Turner-Smith opted for a peekaboo bra underneath a scoop-neck blazer, while Coppola went for the green kimono jacket. Whether she planned for it or not, she is the beneficiary of the *Love Story* effect, as the show’s portrayal of Carolyn Bessette Kennedy’s formative years spent working at Calvin Klein has sent an entirely new audience back to the archives—and straight to Maxfield too.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞資訊未提及周杰倫，主要報導Calvin Klein與Maxfield在洛杉磯舉辦的合作派對及新系列。

recentArticles.title: Michael Jackson Blocks One Of R&B’s Biggest Stars From A New No. 1 Album - Yahoo
recentArticles.snippet: # Michael Jackson Blocks One Of R&B’s Biggest Stars From A New No. 1 Album. For several weeks now, Michael Jackson has appeared at No. 1 on a variety of *Billboard* charts. Jackson occupies the loftiest two spots on a pair of similarly-composed albums registers, and as his collections refuse to budge, he blocks one of the biggest names in R&B from returning to No. 1 with his latest project. Jackson currently sits at Nos. 1 and 2 on both the Top R&B/Hip-Hop Albums and Top R&B Albums charts. ## Michael Jackson Blocks Chris Brown from No. 1. Highlighting just how successful Brown has been on *Billboard*'s ranking of the most-consumed EPs and albums that fall under the hip-hop, rap and R&B genre labels, *Brown* is now tied as one of his worst performers, even as it becomes a top three winner. In addition to both the Top R&B/Hip-Hop Albums and Top R&B Albums tallies, the Grammy winner for Album of the Year returns to the summit on the Vinyl Albums roster, leaping from third place.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞內容主要關於Michael Jackson在Billboard榜單上阻擋了R&B歌手Chris Brown的新專輯登上冠軍，與周杰倫無直接關聯。

recentArticles.title: Michael Jackson Blocked From A New No. 1 Hit — By AI - Yahoo
recentArticles.snippet: # Michael Jackson Blocked From A New No. 1 Hit — By AI. This time around, Jackson's "Billie Jean" dances to new peak positions on a handful of tallies, and it nearly reaches the No. 1 space on a pair of charts – but the classic is held back from ruling, not by another superstar, but by a musical act that is, essentially, not even real. "Billie Jean" ascends one rung on both the R&B/Hip-Hop Digital Song Sales and R&B Digital Song Sales charts, pushing from No. 3 to No. 2. ## Michael Jackson Trails Eddie Dalton, An AI Musical Act. Steady at the summit on the R&B/Hip-Hop Digital Song Sales and R&B Digital Song Sales charts this week is "Somewhere Along the Way" by Eddie Dalton. While "Billie Jean" may not rank as the top-selling track on either of the aforementioned lists, Jackson's single does climb to No. 1 for the first time on another, more competitive rundown.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞資訊主要關於麥可·傑克森的歌曲與AI音樂在排行榜上的表現，與周杰倫無直接關聯。

recentArticles.snippet: # This Bay Area fashion gala ends with soup, cake and Fantastic Negrito. One of the most joyful fashion and art events in the Bay Area returns with a brand-new award and a performance by a three-time Grammy winner. The Oakland art center for artists with developmental disabilities Creative Growth hosts its Beyond Trend fashion show and gala this year at the Ciel Creative Space in Berkeley. Here’s where to watch in the Bay Area. Tony Bravo is the San Francisco Chronicle’s Arts & Culture columnist. Bravo joined the Chronicle staff in 2015 as a reporter for the Style section and also wrote the relationship column “Connectivity.” He is the host of the live interview series “Show & Tell” every month at Four One Nine and created the VoiceMap Chronicle LGBTQ audio tour “Over the Rainbow in the Castro” available for download on the app.

recentArticles.title: Kia MVP Ladder: Myriad of changes mark start of 2019 - NBA
recentArticles.snippet: ### Kia MVP Ladder. LeBron James recently said he thinks he’s the greatest player of all time and would indeed relish adding a fifth Kia MVP to his trophy case in his first season with the Los Angeles Lakers. He’s been playing like it, as the Houston Rockets have taken off over the past three weeks with Harden leading the way. Meanwhile, Giannis Antetokounmpo — the upstart in this season’s MVP chase — is authoring a rather compelling case of his own in Milwaukee. And we didn’t mention the other legit MVP candidates — Kawhi Leonard in Toronto, Stephen Curry and Kevin Durant in Oakland, Joel Embiid in Philadelphia — who are sure to keep this debate rolling as the 2018-19 season rolls on. There’s a new No. 1 in this week’s Kia Race to the MVP Ladder, and for good reason. *The top five this week in the **2018-19 Kia Race to the MVP Ladder:***.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞內容與周杰倫無關，主要報導2018-19賽季NBA MVP的競賽情況，提及多位籃球明星。

recentArticles.title: Drake’s ‘Habibti’ Album: All 11 Tracks Ranked - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: Drake delivers an R&B collection of songs on 'Habibti,' one of three new LPs he just released. He has always been committed to two things: making melodic, R&B music for women and giving people bars on his rap records. We were introduced to him as Heartbreak Drake in his early days, and he was a lover boy before officially dubbing himself that in the lead-up to his 2021 LP *Certified Loverboy*. In the past, he dedicated an entire side of an album to R&B, with the B-side of *Scorpion* in 2018. It felt long overdue for Drake to lock in solely on R&B, and while the joint effort was successful, there was the question of whether he would ever do one on his own. It has a very good beat, and Drake’s flow is cool, but it doesn’t necessarily hit another gear like some of the best songs on *Habibti* do. “White Bone” is one of the best vocal performances by Drake on this album, and he maintains that throughout the first half of the song.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導關於Drake新專輯《Habibti》的歌曲排名與評價，與周杰倫無直接關聯。

recentArticles.title: They Don’t Make Celebrities Like Michael Jackson Anymore - The Atlantic
recentArticles.snippet: The success of *Michael* suggests that audiences are nostalgic for a universal kind of fame that’s rare today. In the 1980s, the former Los Angeles Lakers superstar invited Jackson to a Lakers game, an invitation the singer was initially hesitant to accept because he was worried that his presence would create too much of a frenzy. He existed on a truly singular plane of stardom—and nearly 20 years after his death, he still inspires a unique level of obsession, devotion, and curiosity from fans, even those who weren’t alive to see him in the flesh. The enormous success of *Michael*, the recently released biopic about Jackson’s life, is a testament to that staying power. As I watched *Michael* in the theater, I was flooded by my own memories of Jackson.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞內容主要探討麥可傑克森的普遍性名氣與當代名人現象，與周杰倫無直接關聯。

recentArticles.title: Jung Kook Collaborates With Calvin Klein on a Limited-edition Capsule - WWD
recentArticles.snippet: # EXCLUSIVE: Calvin Klein Partners With Jung Kook on Limited-edition Capsule, Blending Iconic Designs and Rebellious Style. The 20-style capsule reimagines the brand's essentials with Jung Kook's edgy, biker-inspired aesthetic. * Share this article on Talk. Calvin Klein Inc., part of PVH Corp., will launch Jung Kook for Calvin Klein, a limited-edition men’s and women’s capsule in partnership with global brand ambassador Jung Kook, marking his first fashion collaboration. Building on the brand’s long-standing ambassadorship with the artist, the men’s and women’s 20-style capsule reimagines Calvin Klein’s essentials through the lens of Jung Kook’s rebellious and edgy style, blending biker attitude with Calvin Klein’s storied design codes. Discussing why he thinks a Jung Kook by Calvin Klein capsule will resonate with his customers, and whether he believes it will attract new customers to the brand, Savman told WWD, “Jung Kook has been a global ambassador for Calvin Klein for years, and we’ve seen the powerful connection he has with his audience globally.

recentArticles.title: Drake surprise drops three albums and mentions rapper feud - BBC
recentArticles.snippet: # Drake surprise drops three albums and mentions the Kendrick Lamar beef. The rapper's dropped his anticipated solo record, Iceman, plus two more - Habibti and Maid of Honour - with 43 songs in total. They arethe first albums the Canadian has dropped since his beef with US rapper Kendrick Lamar escalated in 2024. And, yes, he does bring it up on the new record. The big question about the heavily hyped new release was whether Drake would use his new music to reignite his bitter feud with Lamar. And on Iceman album opener, Make Them Cry, it looks like Drake has given a glimpse into his feelings at the height of the rap beef. Most critics have yet to share reviews of Iceman and Drake's two other new releases, but reports suggest that streaming services were hit with crashes and slowdowns as fans rushed to hear his new music. Drake has been building excitement for his new album with a series of Iceman livestreams.
recentArticles.summary: Drake surprise drops three albums and mentions rapper feud - BBC

recentArticles.title: Waymo service in Atlanta still suspended after self-driving car stuck in Midtown floodwaters - Atlanta News First
recentArticles.snippet: # Waymo service in Atlanta still suspended after self-driving car stuck in Midtown floodwaters. (Atlanta News First) — Waymo’s self-driving ride-hailing service in Atlanta remained suspended after one of the company’s autonomous vehicles became stuck in floodwaters on a Midtown street Wednesday night. No one was inside the car at the time, according to Waymo. Georgia Tech researchers said the incident highlights a known challenge for autonomous vehicles: judging the depth of water on flooded streets. That can be really a problem for flooding,” said Georgia Tech professor Glen Chou on LIDAR and radar. Chou described the situation as a relatively small issue that can be addressed as autonomous vehicle systems continue to collect data. Dr. Srinivas Peeta, who leads the Autonomous and Connected Transportation Lab at Georgia Tech, said incidents like this can be surprising for the public. Peeta said the vehicles are safe under normal conditions and that safety should improve over time as the technology advances.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導關於Waymo自駕車在亞特蘭大遭遇洪水受困，並提及喬治亞理工學院教授Glen Chou，與周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.title: Lieutenant Governor Jay Collins Visits Northbridge University to Highlight Workforce Training and Career Education in Florida - Positively Osceola
recentArticles.snippet: # Lieutenant Governor Jay Collins Visits Northbridge University to Highlight Workforce Training and Career Education in Florida. — Florida Lieutenant Governor Jay Collins visited Northbridge University on Wednesday afternoon for a workforce development roundtable and campus tour focused on strengthening Florida’s skilled labor pipeline and expanding career-focused education opportunities. The visit brought together university leadership, elected officials, economic development leaders, business executives, and community stakeholders for discussions centered on workforce readiness, healthcare education, skilled trades training, and employer-driven academic pathways designed to meet Florida’s growing labor demands. **“We were honored to welcome Lieutenant Governor Collins to our Kissimmee campus for a meaningful conversation about the future of higher education and workforce development in Florida,” said Dr. James Michael Burkett, president of U.S. operations for Northbridge University. — El vicegobernador de Florida, Jay Collins, visitó el miércoles el campus de Northbridge University para participar en una mesa redonda sobre desarrollo laboral y realizar un recorrido por las instalaciones enfocadas en la capacitación de la futura fuerza laboral del estado.
recentArticles.summary: 這篇新聞報導關於佛羅里達州副州長Jay Collins參訪大學討論勞動力培訓與職業教育，與周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.title: Harry Styles Team Addresses Fan Complaints About Obstructed Views - Stereogum
recentArticles.snippet: Following a special one-off Manchester gig in March, Harry Styles has officially commenced his tour in support of his recent album *Kiss All The Time. So far he's played two nights in Amsterdam, with setlists that include almost all of his new songs, a decent selection of his old songs, and little nods to Talking Heads, Underworld, and Paul Simon. But the setlist isn't what's been getting people talking about Styles' tour; his stage setup is. That's no problem if you're in the stadium seats, but for fans who paid hundreds of euros for GA tickets and spent hours queuing outside the venue, they're being met with some pretty severely obstructed views at certain points of the set. "The floor concept was designed to give fans freedom of movement and the ability to experience the show from different positions, rather than being confined to one fixed viewing angle," a rep told TMZ.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導關於哈利·史泰爾斯（Harry Styles）演唱會因舞台設計導致部分粉絲視線受阻引發抱怨，與周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.snippet: ##### Kitco News The Leading News Source in Precious Metals. Kitco NEWS has a diverse team of journalists reporting on the economy, stock markets, commodities, cryptocurrencies, mining and metals with accuracy and objectivity. Jeremy Szafron joins Kitco News as an anchor and producer from Kitco’s Vancouver bureau. Jeremy began his career in 2006 as a Journalist at CTV (Canada’s largest network), initially engaging audiences as an entertainment reporter before pivoting to business reporting focusing on mining and small-caps. A graduate of Concordia University with a BA in Journalism, Jeremy's academic background laid the foundation for his diverse and dynamic career. Now, as an Anchor at Kitco News, Jeremy will continue to inform a global audience of the latest developments and critical themes in finance and commodities.
